context: Evaluates correct use of the optional parent_id parameter in notebook_create to build nested notebook hierarchies, and correct tree assembly from the flat notebooks_list result. Tests that parent-child relationships are handled through parent_id UUIDs.

checklist.name: parent_id argument in notebook_create
checklist.description: When creating a child notebook, the solution passes the parent notebook's UUID as the second argument to `notebook_create(title, parentId)`.

checklist.name: notebooks_list for tree data
checklist.description: The solution calls `notebooks_list` to fetch all notebooks (the flat list containing parent_id fields) as the data source for tree assembly.

checklist.name: Tree assembly logic
checklist.description: The solution correctly builds a hierarchical tree by grouping notebooks by parent_id, assigning each notebook a `children` array, and returning root-level notebooks (parent_id null) at the top level.

checklist.name: Top-level notebook parent_id
checklist.description: A notebook created without a parentId has `parent_id: null` in the returned object, and appears at the root of the tree.
